## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and refine the structure and content for a detailed article on Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) for GrowthX's new publication.](https://fathom.video/share/ipxws3yPhb-YsM2YuGHKZKyMPSySFKps?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Article should be highly actionable, detailed, and valuable for experienced marketers](https://fathom.video/share/ipxws3yPhb-YsM2YuGHKZKyMPSySFKps?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Structure: Start with principles, then move into specific tactics and examples](https://fathom.video/share/ipxws3yPhb-YsM2YuGHKZKyMPSySFKps?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Aim to "overshare" and provide more depth than competitors' surface-level content](https://fathom.video/share/ipxws3yPhb-YsM2YuGHKZKyMPSySFKps?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [Include AI-assisted content creation disclosure and a TLDR/summary section](https://fathom.video/share/ipxws3yPhb-YsM2YuGHKZKyMPSySFKps?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Topics

### Article Structure and Content

  - [Current outline provides a good starting point](https://fathom.video/share/ipxws3yPhb-YsM2YuGHKZKyMPSySFKps?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Focus on making content highly actionable and detailed](https://fathom.video/share/ipxws3yPhb-YsM2YuGHKZKyMPSySFKps?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Include a brief explanation of GEO principles, then dive into specific tactics](https://fathom.video/share/ipxws3yPhb-YsM2YuGHKZKyMPSySFKps?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [Add a TLDR or summary section at the beginning](https://fathom.video/share/ipxws3yPhb-YsM2YuGHKZKyMPSySFKps?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [Potentially disclose AI's role in content creation (e.g., transcript summarization)](https://fathom.video/share/ipxws3yPhb-YsM2YuGHKZKyMPSySFKps?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)

### Target Audience and Tone

  - [Writing for experienced marketers who need in-depth, practical information](https://fathom.video/share/ipxws3yPhb-YsM2YuGHKZKyMPSySFKps?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
  - [Avoid a prescriptive tone; present information as current understanding](https://fathom.video/share/ipxws3yPhb-YsM2YuGHKZKyMPSySFKps?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
  - [Balance technical details with actionable insights](https://fathom.video/share/ipxws3yPhb-YsM2YuGHKZKyMPSySFKps?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)

### Key Content Areas

  - [Explain how LLMs conduct searches and interact with web content](https://fathom.video/share/ipxws3yPhb-YsM2YuGHKZKyMPSySFKps?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [Detail the process of selecting prompts for GEO](https://fathom.video/share/ipxws3yPhb-YsM2YuGHKZKyMPSySFKps?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [Discuss the importance of community mentions (e.g., Reddit) as the "new link building"](https://fathom.video/share/ipxws3yPhb-YsM2YuGHKZKyMPSySFKps?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Outline best practices for structuring site content for AI readability](https://fathom.video/share/ipxws3yPhb-YsM2YuGHKZKyMPSySFKps?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)

### Publication Goals and Strategy

  - [Aim for weekly content publication](https://fathom.video/share/ipxws3yPhb-YsM2YuGHKZKyMPSySFKps?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Use this article to drive newsletter subscriptions and future workshop attendance](https://fathom.video/share/ipxws3yPhb-YsM2YuGHKZKyMPSySFKps?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
  - [Explore AI-assisted workflows to scale content production](https://fathom.video/share/ipxws3yPhb-YsM2YuGHKZKyMPSySFKps?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)

### Design and Branding

  - [Current design direction focuses on clean, content-centric layouts](https://fathom.video/share/ipxws3yPhb-YsM2YuGHKZKyMPSySFKps?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
  - [High-quality design to set GrowthX apart and impress potential clients](https://fathom.video/share/ipxws3yPhb-YsM2YuGHKZKyMPSySFKps?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
